title: find_header_end: use windows(4).position() not manual index
description:
message.rs find_header_end (lines 126-133) scans for 

 using a manual range iterator with 4 raw index accesses (raw[i], raw[i+1], raw[i+2], raw[i+3]). Idiomatic Rust: raw.windows(4).position(|w| w == b"

") expresses the same intent without manual bounds arithmetic, uses a safe slice, and is shorter. The 

 fallback follows the same pattern: raw.windows(2).position(|w| w == b"

").
